data.title: Orca Security Accelerates AI-Driven Cloud Security Growth with TD SYNNEX Partnership
data.description: Orca Security, a company specializing in agentless cloud security, has recently disclosed a pivotal distribution deal for the North American region. This agreement, established with TD SYNNEX, a prominent global distributor and IT solutions aggregator, signifies a notable progression in Orca Security's sales approach. The shift towards a distribution-centric framework is aimed at bolstering scalability, financial versatility, and on-the-ground support for its growing array of resellers.
TRUMP VOWS TO ELIMINATE IRANIAN SHIPS CLOSE TO US BLOCKADE

data.title: Global Graders Market Outlook 2025-2035: Infrastructure Expansion and Smart Equipment Integration to Drive USD 6.8 Billion Opportunity
data.description: In a recent report by Future Market Insights, it was revealed that the worldwide graders market is anticipated to witness a significant expansion, jumping from USD 4.2 billion in 2025 to USD 6.8 billion by 2035. This forecast suggests a steady compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.0% during the specified period.

data.title: ABCmouse Nominated for Regional Emmy® Award for "ABCmouse Visits Fenway Park | Baseball Adventure for Kids"
data.description: An Emmy was awarded to the acclaimed early learning platform created by Age of Learning in Los Angeles on April 13, 2026. The platform, known as ABCmouse®, has been the top choice for families and educators for over 15 years, with it being the most downloaded kids' educational app.

data.title: Prosci's Evolved Brand: Reflecting 30 Years of Leadership as a Trusted Enterprise Change Partner
data.description: Prosci, the leading global company in change management, has revealed its new brand identity to represent its support for clients in navigating complex organizational changes. The launch of the evolved brand was made public in Fort Collins, Colorado on April 13, 2026. This move highlights Prosci's commitment to guiding clients through enterprise-wide transformations both now and in the future.

data.title: Only 1 in 5 Hospitality Respondents Know How to Claim the "No Tax on Tips" Deduction - OysterLink Poll
data.description: In Austin, Texas, as of April 13, 2026, a recent survey conducted by OysterLink among about 100 hospitality workers reveals that the majority are familiar with the "No Tax on Tips" deduction. This deduction was implemented through the One Big Beautiful Bill that has gained attention as Tax Day on April 15 approaches.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slides On Trump's Strait Of Hormuz Blockade; Oil Prices Surging Again (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to President Trump announcing a plan to blockade the Strait of Hormuz. This led to a surge in oil prices. The market reacted swiftly to this news, with the Dow sliding as a result. This update showcases the impact of political decisions on financial markets, with the index seeing a notable drop. Oil prices, on the other hand, climbed significantly in response to the potential disruptions. Investors were closely monitoring these developments, reflecting the interconnected nature of global events and their influence on stock performance.
Fear & Greed Index: 38/100 - Fear

data.title: EAIGLE Introduces YardSight Mobile™: A New AI-Native Approach to Real-Time Yard Asset Mapping
data.description: EAIGLE has introduced YardSight Mobile™, an innovative AI-powered computer vision solution designed to enhance shunt trucks into real-time visibility engines. This technology is set to revolutionize operations by decreasing dependency on manual processes and infrastructure-heavy deployments. The launch was announced in Atlanta on April 13, 2026. This cutting-edge solution promises to significantly improve efficiency and accuracy in various industries.

data.title: Philatron Wire and Cable Celebrates 52 Years of American Innovation and Engineering Leadership
data.description: A company based in Santa Fe Springs, California, Philatron Wire and Cable is marking its 52nd anniversary of operations this May. Established in 1974, the company has developed a reputation for American manufacturing, engineering ingenuity, and collaborative relationships with customers. Starting as a specialized cable provider, Philatron has expanded its operations over the years.

data.title: Roof Maintenance Tips Explained In HelloNation Article Featuring Roofing Expert Michael Majeski
data.description: A recent article provides guidance on how homeowners in New York can prolong the lifespan of their roofs and avoid typical problems. Released on April 13, 2026, in Fulton, N.Y., the article suggests practical measures. Amidst the state's harsh weather, it poses the question: How can residents safeguard their roofs? Referencing a HelloNation piece, a Roofing Expert advises on the best steps to take in such conditions.

data.title: SOULSVILLE FOUNDATION ANNOUNCES THE 2ND ANNUAL POWER OF MUSIC HONORS CELEBRATING THE TRANSFORMATIVE POWER OF MUSIC TO DRIVE CHANGE
data.description: Renowned healthcare professional Dr. Žak Ozmo is set to be honored with the inaugural "Health & Wellness" Award in Memphis, Tennessee. The prestigious accolade will be presented at the upcoming second annual Power of Music Honors ceremony on April 30, 2026, at Crosstown Theater in Memphis. The event organized by the Soulsville Foundation aims to acknowledge individuals who have made significant contributions to the community through their leadership and commitment to health and wellness initiatives. The award ceremony is expected to draw attention from a wide audience as it celebrates the achievements of Dr. Žak Ozmo and others in the field.

data.title: RapidClaims Expands RCM Platform with RapidRecovery, Completing an Integrated Revenue Cycle from Clean Claim to Denial Resolution
data.description: A company based in New York, RapidClaims, has unveiled a new addition to its AI-driven revenue cycle management platform called RapidRecovery. This latest solution, aimed at managing denials, complements the company's existing suite of services, completing its offerings across the entire claims lifecycle. The launch aligns with RapidClaims showcasing its comprehensive platform at Booth #217 during Becker's 16th Annual Meeting 2026. RapidClaims was established with the core belief that denials do not have to be an unavoidable expense in the process.

data.title: Award-Winning Steakhouse Sets Grand Opening Date for Phoenix-Area Restaurant
data.description: On June 8, Perry's Steakhouse and Grille will open its newest location in Gilbert's Northside at SanTan Village. Known as one of the top steakhouses in the country, Perry's Steakhouse & Grille maintains its commitment to quality by offering butcher-fresh USDA aged prime steaks. The restaurant's menu also features a variety of other dishes, establishing it as an award-winning dining destination.

data.title: Revolution Medicines Rallies After Phase 3 Pancreatic Cancer Trial Doubles Survival Versus Chemo
data.description: Revolution Medicines Inc.'s (NASDAQ: RVMD) stock is surging in premarket trading following promising results from its Phase 3 RASolute 302 trial for daraxonrasib in metastatic pancreatic cancer. The oncology company focuses on tailored treatments for RAS-addicted cancers. Daraxonrasib displayed significant improvements in progression-free and overall survival, with a median overall survival of 13.2 months, compared to 6.7 months with standard chemotherapy. These results will be submitted to regulatory bodies for potential approvals, with plans to present the findings at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting.

data.title: LINK aiming for $9.30 breakout as technical indicators signal mixed. Currently at $8.80 with RSI at 47.78. Analysts predict $8.83-$11.30 by 2026.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink (LINK) is currently trading at $8.80 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.78. Technical analysis indicates a possible increase to the resistance level of $9.30. Analyst predictions vary for the year 2026, with estimates ranging from $8.83 to $11.30.

data.title: Filecoin aims $2.94 in multi-year breakout; analyst targets $7.50 and $11.40. Current price at $0.87 indicates bullish momentum.
data.description: Filecoin (FIL) is positioned for a notable rally, with analysts setting price targets at $2.94, $7.50, and $11.40. The current technical analysis indicates a bullish trend forming at $0.87. This suggests a potential breakout in the near future for FIL.

data.title: Over 2,200 Long Term Care Workers Now on Strike
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, long term care workers, members of the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE), have initiated a strike at 24 facilities statewide. Additional strikes are anticipated in the near future. Picketing will be staged at various locations such as St. Vincent’s Nursing Home at 2080 Windsor St, Halifax; Harbourstone Enhanced Care at 84 Kenwood Dr, Sydney River; Ocean View Care at 1909 Caldwell Rd, Eastern Passage; and Admiral Long Term Care Centre at 30 Fairfax Dr, Halifax.

data.title: [solidcore] Unveils 2026 Core Collective, Expanding Member Experience Through Leading Wellness Partnerships
data.description: A strength-training brand, [solidcore], based in Arlington, VA, has launched its 2026 Core Collective program, aimed at providing exclusive offers and experiences to its members. The initiative expands the brand's reach beyond the studio by collaborating with Celsius, KOIA, Salt & Stone, Thorne, and Tower 28. These partnerships offer a blend of in-studio and digital experiences to support members in their overall health journey. The program is designed to enhance member value and enrich the brand's impact, containing a curated selection of benefits for members.
